allow: Bash(python -c "from main import create_tables, seed_data; create_tables\(\); seed_data\(\); print\('DB initialized OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from main import create_tables, migrate_tables, seed_data; create_tables\(\); migrate_tables\(\); seed_data\(\); print\('DB rebuilt OK'\)")

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8000"; $routes = @\("/admin/revenue","/admin/history","/admin/properties","/admin/tenants"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$r" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "GET $r -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Host "GET $r -> $code \(expected 401/403 = route exists\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $resp.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$resp.Content.Length\)\) } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Host "Status: $code" })

PowerShell(try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $resp.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(500,$resp.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $paths = $json.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object; $paths | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8002"; $tests = @\( @{M="GET"; P="/admin/revenue"}, @{M="GET"; P="/admin/history"}, @{M="GET"; P="/admin/properties"}, @{M="GET"; P="/admin/tenants"}, @{M="PUT"; P="/admin/landlords/1/set-fee"}, @{M="DELETE"; P="/admin/landlords/1"} \); foreach \($t in $tests\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$\($t.P\)" -Method $t.M -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "$\($t.M\) $\($t.P\) -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Host "$\($t.M\) $\($t.P\) -> $code" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8002"; $routes = @\("/admin/revenue", "/admin/history", "/admin/properties", "/admin/tenants"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$r" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "GET $r -> $code" }; $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/admin/landlords/1/set-fee" -Method PUT -Body '{"monthly_fee":0}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "PUT /admin/landlords/1/set-fee -> $code"; $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/admin/landlords/1" -Method DELETE -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "DELETE /admin/landlords/1 -> $code")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8002/docs" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Docs status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8003"; $results = @\(\); foreach \($r in @\("/admin/revenue","/admin/history","/admin/properties","/admin/tenants"\)\) { $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "$base$r" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $results += "GET $r -> $code" }; foreach \($item in $results\) { Write-Host $item }; $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/admin/landlords/1/set-fee" -Method PUT -Body '{"monthly_fee":500}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "PUT /admin/landlords/1/set-fee -> $code"; $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/admin/landlords/1" -Method DELETE -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "DELETE /admin/landlords/1 -> $code")

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8003"; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@rentease.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; Write-Host "Token obtained: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)...")

PowerShell($base = "http://127.0.0.1:8003"; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@rentease.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $hdrs = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; foreach \($r in @\("/admin/revenue","/admin/history","/admin/properties","/admin/tenants"\)\) { $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "$base$r" -Headers $hdrs -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "GET $r -> $code" }; $code = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "$base/admin/landlords/1/set-fee" -Method PUT -Headers $hdrs -Body '{"monthly_fee":500}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Host "PUT /admin/landlords/1/set-fee -> $code")

PowerShell($pid8003 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8003 -EA SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8003\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8003 -Force; Write-Host "Stopped port 8003 \(pid $pid8003\)" }; $pid8001 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -EA SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8001\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8001 -Force; Write-Host "Stopped port 8001 \(pid $pid8001\)" })
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('main.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
